mapper.select:
SELECT p.PROD_CODE, p.CORP_CODE, c.CORP_NAME, p.PROD_NAME, p.PROD_NO, p.PROD_GYU, p.PROD_JAI, p.PROD_DANJ, p.PROD_DANW, p.PROD_DANG, p.PROD_GUBN, p.PROD_UPJONG, p.PROD_MODEL, p.PROD_DATE, p.product_file_name FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_corp c ON p.CORP_CODE = c.CORP_CODE
AND p.PROD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwProdName},'%')
AND p.PROD_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwProdNo},'%')
AND c.CORP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwCorpName},'%')
ORDER BY p.PROD_CODE LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_corp c ON p.CORP_CODE = c.CORP_CODE
AND p.PROD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwProdName},'%')
AND p.PROD_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwProdNo},'%')
AND c.CORP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwCorpName},'%')
SELECT MAX(PROD_CODE) FROM tb_product WHERE PROD_CODE REGEXP '^P[0-9]+$'
SELECT p.*, c.CORP_NAME FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_corp c ON p.CORP_CODE = c.CORP_CODE WHERE p.PROD_CODE = #{prodCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_product ( PROD_CODE, CORP_CODE, PROD_NAME, PROD_NO, PROD_GYU, PROD_JAI, PROD_DANJ, PROD_DANW, PROD_DANG, PROD_CNO, PROD_GUBN, TECH_NO, PROD_PG, PROD_PG1, PROD_PG2, PROD_PGS, PROD_PGS1, PROD_PGS2, PROD_SG, PROD_SG1, PROD_SG2, PROD_GD1, PROD_GD2, PROD_GD3, PROD_GD4, PROD_GD5, PROD_E1, PROD_E2, PROD_E3, PROD_E4, PROD_E5, PROD_NOTE, PROD_DATE, PROD_MODEL, PROD_DANCH, PROD_PLT, PROD_BOX, PROD_BOXSU, PROD_SNP, PROD_BANGCH, PROD_VNYL, PROD_PAD, PROD_REALJAI, TECH_PATTERN, TECH_SEQ, PROD_CD, PROD_KIJONG, PROD_DO, PROD_RA, PROD_UPJONG, PROD_APPEAR, PROD_TRANSFORM, PROD_REFNO, PROD_PWSNO, PROD_WHADEEP, PROD_FILE, PROD_FAC1, PROD_FAC2, PROD_FAC3, PROD_FAC4, PROD_FAC5, PROD_FAC6, PROD_FAC7, PROD_FAC8, PROD_GJ, PROD_BH, PROD_CHISU1N, PROD_CHISU2N, PROD_CHISU3N, PROD_CHISU4N, PROD_CHISU5N, PROD_CHISU1S, PROD_CHISU2S, PROD_CHISU3S, PROD_CHISU4S, PROD_CHISU5S, PROD_POLISH, PROD_SI, PROD_SI1, PROD_SI2, PROD_SR, PROD_SR1, PROD_SR2, product_file_name, apperance_file_name, heat_file_name, drawing_file_name ) VALUES ( #{prod_code}, #{corp_code}, #{prod_name}, #{prod_no}, #{prod_gyu}, #{prod_jai}, #{prod_danj}, #{prod_danw}, #{prod_dang}, #{prod_cno}, #{prod_gubn}, #{tech_no}, #{prod_pg}, #{prod_pg1}, #{prod_pg2}, #{prod_pgs}, #{prod_pgs1}, #{prod_pgs2}, #{prod_sg}, #{prod_sg1}, #{prod_sg2}, #{prod_gd1}, #{prod_gd2}, #{prod_gd3}, #{prod_gd4}, #{prod_gd5}, #{prod_e1}, #{prod_e2}, #{prod_e3}, #{prod_e4}, #{prod_e5}, #{prod_note}, #{prod_date}, #{prod_model}, #{prod_danch}, #{prod_plt}, #{prod_box}, #{prod_boxsu}, #{prod_snp}, #{prod_bangch}, #{prod_vnyl}, #{prod_pad}, #{prod_realjai}, #{tech_pattern}, #{tech_seq}, #{prod_cd}, #{prod_kijong}, #{prod_do}, #{prod_ra}, #{prod_upjong}, #{prod_appear}, #{prod_transform}, #{prod_refno}, #{prod_pwsno}, #{prod_whadeep}, #{prod_file}, #{prod_fac1}, #{prod_fac2}, #{prod_fac3}, #{prod_fac4}, #{prod_fac5}, #{prod_fac6}, #{prod_fac7}, #{prod_fac8}, #{prod_gj}, #{prod_bh}, #{prod_chisu1n}, #{prod_chisu2n}, #{prod_chisu3n}, #{prod_chisu4n}, #{prod_chisu5n}, #{prod_chisu1s}, #{prod_chisu2s}, #{prod_chisu3s}, #{prod_chisu4s}, #{prod_chisu5s}, #{prod_polish}, #{prod_si}, #{prod_si1}, #{prod_si2}, #{prod_sr}, #{prod_sr1}, #{prod_sr2}, #{product_file_name}, #{apperance_file_name}, #{heat_file_name}, #{drawing_file_name} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_product SET CORP_CODE=#{corp_code}, PROD_NAME=#{prod_name}, PROD_NO=#{prod_no}, PROD_GYU=#{prod_gyu}, PROD_JAI=#{prod_jai}, PROD_DANJ=#{prod_danj}, PROD_DANW=#{prod_danw}, PROD_DANG=#{prod_dang}, PROD_CNO=#{prod_cno}, PROD_GUBN=#{prod_gubn}, TECH_NO=#{tech_no}, PROD_PG=#{prod_pg}, PROD_PG1=#{prod_pg1}, PROD_PG2=#{prod_pg2}, PROD_PGS=#{prod_pgs}, PROD_PGS1=#{prod_pgs1}, PROD_PGS2=#{prod_pgs2}, PROD_SG=#{prod_sg}, PROD_SG1=#{prod_sg1}, PROD_SG2=#{prod_sg2}, PROD_GD1=#{prod_gd1}, PROD_GD2=#{prod_gd2}, PROD_GD3=#{prod_gd3}, PROD_GD4=#{prod_gd4}, PROD_GD5=#{prod_gd5}, PROD_E1=#{prod_e1}, PROD_E2=#{prod_e2}, PROD_E3=#{prod_e3}, PROD_E4=#{prod_e4}, PROD_E5=#{prod_e5}, PROD_NOTE=#{prod_note}, PROD_DATE=#{prod_date}, PROD_MODEL=#{prod_model}, PROD_DANCH=#{prod_danch}, PROD_PLT=#{prod_plt}, PROD_BOX=#{prod_box}, PROD_BOXSU=#{prod_boxsu}, PROD_SNP=#{prod_snp}, PROD_BANGCH=#{prod_bangch}, PROD_VNYL=#{prod_vnyl}, PROD_PAD=#{prod_pad}, PROD_REALJAI=#{prod_realjai}, TECH_PATTERN=#{tech_pattern}, TECH_SEQ=#{tech_seq}, PROD_CD=#{prod_cd}, PROD_KIJONG=#{prod_kijong}, PROD_DO=#{prod_do}, PROD_RA=#{prod_ra}, PROD_UPJONG=#{prod_upjong}, PROD_APPEAR=#{prod_appear}, PROD_TRANSFORM=#{prod_transform}, PROD_REFNO=#{prod_refno}, PROD_PWSNO=#{prod_pwsno}, PROD_WHADEEP=#{prod_whadeep}, PROD_FILE=#{prod_file}, PROD_FAC1=#{prod_fac1}, PROD_FAC2=#{prod_fac2}, PROD_FAC3=#{prod_fac3}, PROD_FAC4=#{prod_fac4}, PROD_FAC5=#{prod_fac5}, PROD_FAC6=#{prod_fac6}, PROD_FAC7=#{prod_fac7}, PROD_FAC8=#{prod_fac8}, PROD_GJ=#{prod_gj}, PROD_BH=#{prod_bh}, PROD_CHISU1N=#{prod_chisu1n}, PROD_CHISU2N=#{prod_chisu2n}, PROD_CHISU3N=#{prod_chisu3n}, PROD_CHISU4N=#{prod_chisu4n}, PROD_CHISU5N=#{prod_chisu5n}, PROD_CHISU1S=#{prod_chisu1s}, PROD_CHISU2S=#{prod_chisu2s}, PROD_CHISU3S=#{prod_chisu3s}, PROD_CHISU4S=#{prod_chisu4s}, PROD_CHISU5S=#{prod_chisu5s}, PROD_POLISH=#{prod_polish}, PROD_SI=#{prod_si}, PROD_SI1=#{prod_si1}, PROD_SI2=#{prod_si2}, PROD_SR=#{prod_sr}, PROD_SR1=#{prod_sr1}, PROD_SR2=#{prod_sr2}, product_file_name=#{product_file_name}, apperance_file_name=#{apperance_file_name}, heat_file_name=#{heat_file_name}, drawing_file_name=#{drawing_file_name} WHERE PROD_CODE = #{prod_code}
